nodes.name: Andean siskin
nodes.summary: Andean siskin（Andean siskin，学名 Spinus spinescens），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联14个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, and Venezuela

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies occurs in the coastal mountains of Aragua in northern Venezuela, the Andes of western Venezuela, in the Serranía del Perijá along the Colombia-Venezuela border and in the Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta of northern Colombia, and from the eastern Andes in Colombia south to Valle, Putumayo, Nariño and Pichincha Province in Ecuador
